aboutPanel.title: About
aboutPanel.description: An open-source desktop application for the built environment — built with Tauri, React and TypeScript. Part of the OpenAEC Foundation: free tooling for architecture, engineering and construction.
aboutPanel.companyDescription: The built environment belongs to everyone. The OpenAEC Foundation develops and maintains free, open-source software for architecture, engineering and construction — so that knowledge and tools are shared, not locked away. Our core values: Open by default · Build together · Own your tools · Ship it.
aboutPanel.copyright: © 2026 OpenAEC Foundation. Code: MIT. Content: CC BY-SA 4.0.

importPanel.title: Import
importPanel.fromFileDesc: Import data from supported file formats
importPanel.fromTemplateDesc: Load a pre-built template as a starting point

exportPanel.title: Export
exportPanel.asPdfDesc: Save the current document as a PDF file
exportPanel.asImageDesc: Save as PNG or JPEG image files
exportPanel.asHtmlDesc: Export the document as an HTML file
